subcodes.first_line: O Muṣṭafá! There hath come before Us a letter from Jamál — him who hath soared in the atmosphere of the love of thy Lord
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
